summary: This role is an exceptionally poor fit because it fundamentally conflicts with your priorities of predictable hours and personal wellbeing through its mandatory night, weekend, and holiday schedules. The high-stakes, fast-paced analytical reasoning required for emergency clinical decisions directly contradicts your preference for protocol-driven work and your struggles with logical deduction. Given the structural culture of sacrifice and high burnout risk, this career is unlikely to offer the long-term sustainability you seek.
